description: Product Description Soft non-skid bottoms to lessen accidents on slippery floors. Premium cotton and fleece provide comfort, warmth & protection for baby's feet. Natural and breathable material to ensure baby's little feet all-day comfort and promotes healthy foot growth. Designed to stay sturdy on baby's feet with adjustable hook and loop closure and elastic ankle, prevents shoes from falling off, so no more lost socks or shoes! Size Information for reference: Length:11cm/4.33'' Recommended Age:Fit For 0-6 months Length:12cm/4.72'' Recommended Age:Fit For 6-12 months Length:13cm/5.12'' Recommended Age:Fit For 12-18 months NOTE: Please allow 1-2cm error due to manual measurement and make sure you do not mind before ordering. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thank you! 1 inch = 2.54 cm Fashion baby booties 100% Poly-cotton/warm fleece; Dots non-skid rubber grippers on bottom; Fleece baby booties for unisex baby; Adorable ankle support; Newborn shoes Baby Booties Infant Shoes Toddler Shoes These baby booties are Great for Beginner Walkers Item Type:Baby booties Material:High quality cotton upper,soft velvet sole,Fleece Lining for comfort Color:White,Black,Khaki,Pink,Grey,Red Closure:Hook and Loop Size: Fit For 0-18 Months Baby Season:Spring,Autumn,Winter Gender: Unisex Baby Package Include: 1 Pair of baby booties COZY DEAL BOOTIES THAT WON'T BUDGE DESIGNED TO LAST GREAT GIFT EASY-CARE FABRIC COMFORTABLE Soft Breathable Cotton,Lightweight and Grippers bottom design perfect for new walkers play indoor around the house.Besides,thebooties is wide and there is enough space for the baby's feet to grow, which will be the best choice for the baby with chubby feet! SAFE Safety tested for peace of mind.NO any stimulation to the skin of baby.They are light weight allowing for natural movement of the ankles whilst offering great protection. They’re very durable and easily washed. CLOSURE Hook and Loop closed easy to put on, take off, and most importantly, stay on your child's feet! Perfect gifts for winter days,walking indoors or outdoors,party,baby shower to keep the baby feet warm and comfortable all-day long. MATERIAL This booties for baby toddlers is made of soft and breathable Cotton upper,Fleece lining. And shoes bottom is with tender and anti-slip design and material. They are very lightweight and comfortable, flexible, elastic baby girl boy shoes which can support natural foot movement.
